examples: She is bashful in doing [to do] anything.
The voices ceased, the singers, bashful but smiling, exchanged sidelong glances, and silence succeeded—but for a moment only.
When he first met Malala, in tow with her father, she was kind of bashful.
Organiser Ilona Soane-Sands said the current generation of potential Miss Alderneys were more bashful than ever before.
